model._hint: Fine-tune: ogkalu/Comic-Diffusion v2 (SD 1.5 base). All 6 comic styles trained simultaneously. ~2 GB; no sequential offload needed.

generation._hint: 20–30 steps. 25 is a solid default. | CFG 7–8 recommended. | SD 1.5 native 512×512.

system._hint: ~2 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: disabled (model fits in unified memory)

notes.about: Generates Marvel-style superhero comic illustrations in the style of Pepe Larraz — dynamic poses, sharp linework, vibrant colours, and the polished quality of mainstream US comics.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'pepelarraz artstyle' must appear in every prompt. Examples: 'X-Men battle scene, pepelarraz artstyle', 'a caped hero in flight above the city, pepelarraz artstyle', 'a villain in dramatic pose, pepelarraz artstyle'.
